calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-02-2010 Continued To Jun-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Stubbs for Anita Repetto.

Mr. Stubbs stated that he had a supplemental declaration from the Executor addressing all of the points raised by the Examiner and that he would file it. The matter was continued to June 15, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel informed the Court that he would be on vacation until June 22, 2010. The matter will be continued to June 30, 2010 if a further continuance is needed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-04-2010 Continued To Jun-02-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Continued To May-04-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-06-2010 Continued To Apr-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Stubbs for Anita Repetto.

Mr. Stubbs stated that he had executed the draft and will for the spouse and that this was a clerical error on his part. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Aguerre.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-22-2009 Continued To Jul-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
